__NOINDEX__
==Blue Skills==
{| class="wikitable"
!Relic
!Skill Icon
!Skill
{{CargoRelicSkills
|relic=Bach Concerto
|skill=Place in Tadpole Pond: Generate W-tads by +5% 
|category=Tadpolepond
|level=1}}
{{CargoRelicSkills
|relic=Demoiselles d'Avignon
|skill=Place in Tadpole Pond: This Relic's ART +5 
|category=Tadpolepond
|level=1}}
{{CargoRelicSkills
|relic=Gregor Specimen
|skill=Place in Tadpole Pond: B-tad Output +5% 
|category=Tadpolepond
|level=1}}
{{CargoRelicSkills
|relic=Sleeping Gypsy
|skill=Place in Tadpole Pond: Max Cap +5% 
|category=Tadpolepond
|level=1}}
{{CargoRelicSkills
|relic=The Walking Man
|skill=Place in Tadpole Pond: B-tad Output +5% 
|category=Tadpolepond
|level=1}}
|}

==Purple Skills==
{| class="wikitable"
!Relic
!Skill Icon
!Skill
{{CargoRelicSkills
|relic=Boy with Goose
|skill=Place in Tadpole Pond: This Relic's ART +10 
|category=Tadpolepond
|level=2}}

{{CargoRelicSkills
|relic=Haulers on Volga
|skill=Place in Tadpole Pond: Generate W-tads by +15% 
|category=Tadpolepond
|level=2}}

{{CargoRelicSkills
|relic=Haulers on Volga
|skill=Place in Tadpole Pond: This Relic's ART +10 
|category=Tadpolepond
|level=2}}

{{CargoRelicSkills
|relic=Manneken Pis
|skill=Place in Tadpole Pond: B-tad Output +15% 
|category=Tadpolepond
|level=2}}

{{CargoRelicSkills
|relic=Manneken Pis
|skill=Place in Tadpole Pond: Max Cap +15% 
|category=Tadpolepond
|level=2}}

{{CargoRelicSkills
|relic=Marquis Bell
|skill=Place in Tadpole Pond: Max Cap +15% 
|category=Tadpolepond
|level=2}}

{{CargoRelicSkills
|relic=Marquis Bell
|skill=Place in Tadpole Pond: Generate W-tads by +15% 
|category=Tadpolepond
|level=2}}

{{CargoRelicSkills
|relic=Mermaid Statue
|skill=Place in Tadpole Pond: B-tad Output +15% 
|category=Tadpolepond
|level=2}}

{{CargoRelicSkills
|relic=Mermaid Statue
|skill=Place in Tadpole Pond: Max Cap +15% 
|category=Tadpolepond
|level=2}}

{{CargoRelicSkills
|relic=Observatory
|skill=Place in Tadpole Pond: This Relic's TECH +10 
|category=Tadpolepond
|level=2}}

{{CargoRelicSkills
|relic=Peacock Throne
|skill=Place in Tadpole Pond: B-tad Output +15% 
|category=Tadpolepond
|level=2}}

{{CargoRelicSkills
|relic=Peacock Throne
|skill=Place in Tadpole Pond: This Relic's ART +10 
|category=Tadpolepond
|level=2}}
|}

==Further Tester Skills - To Be Removed==
{{CargoRelicSkills
|relic=Observatory
|skill=Place in Cathay Museum: Tech Checks -10
|category=Cathay
|level=2}}
